name: asis_accuracy
label: A1. As-Is Processes (Accuracy): Are the current process flows

name: asis_completeness
label: A2. As-Is Processes (Completeness): Are there additional citizen-facing services or undocumented manual steps missing?

name: tobe_feasibility
label: B1. To-Be Processes (Feasibility): Are the proposed changes realistic? What operational constraints might affect implementation?

name: tobe_alignment
label: B2. To-Be Processes (Strategic Alignment): Do the "quick wins" address critical gaps and support strategic objectives?

name: records_prioritisation
label: C1. Records Management (Prioritisation): Are identified record categories correct? Are sensitive records highlighted?

name: records_registry
label: C2. Records Management (Registry Challenges): Are there major storage/classification challenges not captured?

name: automation_workflow
label: D1. Automation (Workflow Prioritisation): Will automating these services improve citizen access? Are higher-impact services missing?

name: automation_integration
label: D2. Automation (Integration): Are required dependencies on platforms like eCitizen

name: governance_policy
label: E1. Governance (Policy & Compliance): Are there legislative barriers or ODPC compliance issues?

name: governance_framework
label: E2. Governance (Institutional Framework): Is the proposed Digital Transformation Unit feasible? What else is needed?

name: capacity_readiness
label: F1. Capacity Building (Organisational Readiness): What digital skills gaps exist? What training is required?

name: capacity_leadership
label: F2. Capacity Building (Leadership Support): Is there executive sponsorship? What leadership structures are required?

label: 1. Synthesis Accuracy: Does the summary reflect breakout discussions? Are key issues missing?
